description_long: This humanoid robot features a retro-inspired design with a predominantly blue body accented by orange joints and hands. Its head is boxy with two large, round eyes and a horizontal mouthpiece resembling a speaker grille, topped by a spring antenna with a metallic sphere. The torso is rectangular with a central panel and a stylized emblem, while the arms and legs are segmented with visible spring-like joints and cylindrical forearms and shins. The hands are claw-like pincers, and the feet are wide and flat, providing stability. The robot's overall appearance is playful and mechanical, with visible bolts and seams suggesting a robust, metallic construction.
description: A blue, retro-styled humanoid robot with orange joints, large round eyes, a spring antenna, and claw-like hands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robot's expressive face, spring antenna, central chest panel, and both claw hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the boxy head profile, spring elbow joint, and the curvature of the back and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back of the head and torso, with both arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right arm's articulation, the side of the head, and the mechanical details of the limbs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent at the elbows, hands open in a neutral position, legs straight, and head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; the robot has integrated blue and orange panels with metallic and plastic coverings as part of its structure.
attribute_facial_features: The face features two large, round, protruding eyes, a horizontal mouth grille with metallic teeth-like details, and no visible nose. The head is topped with a spring antenna.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible hinge and rotary joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees. Hands are articulated with two-pronged pincers, and feet are rigid and flat.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Two large round eyes on the head likely function as cameras or visual sensors; no other sensors are visible.
